name: Nebula Cloud
description: An interactive space-themed nebular cloud with fluid movement.

schema.label: Gas Density
schema.description: Total number of gas particles. Higher values make the nebula look thicker.

schema.label: Star Count
schema.description: Number of background stars in the night sky.

schema.label: Smear Brush Size
schema.description: Width of the path carved through the gas.

schema.label: Healing Speed
schema.description: How fast the gas drifts back. Low values feel like smoke, high values feel like jelly.
